prompt:
Goal: Create a glossy anime-style fantasy payment card design for Komari Hanasaki, themed around pink cosmos flowers and a dreamy sunset garden.

Canvas: Horizontal rounded-rectangle credit card, 16:10 ratio, shown straight-on against a plain white background with a soft drop shadow. The card has rounded corners, a thin pale border, and a polished plastic finish.

Visual style: Soft romantic anime illustration, pastel pink, lavender, peach, and warm gold palette, luminous sunset sky, delicate sparkles, floating petals, shallow depth of field, elegant premium card aesthetic.

Main illustration: A young anime girl with short dark brown bobbed hair and a small ahoge sits among blooming cosmos flowers. She wears a pale white-pink sleeveless dress with subtle lace and a pink waist ribbon. Her face is covered by a centered opaque square privacy block in muted brown-pink, approximately one quarter of the card height and width, placed over the upper-right-center of the portrait.

Background: A field of pink cosmos flowers fills the entire card, with large blossoms on both left and right edges, smaller flowers behind the character, glowing particles, soft clouds, and drifting petals in the sky.

Card elements: Include exactly 7 main card UI/text elements: 1 gold EMV chip on the left, 1 white contactless symbol on the upper right, 1 large card title, 1 embossed card number line, 1 cardholder label/name block, 1 expiry block, and 1 payment brand logo.

Text content: Top left large white cursive script reads Komari with a small flower mark near the final letter. Beneath it, spaced uppercase serif text reads “COSMOS CARD”. Across the middle, embossed metallic-gold digits are divided into exactly 4 groups: “1234”, “5678”, “9012”, “3456”. Bottom left label reads “CARDHOLDER”, with embossed name “KOMARI HANASAKI” below it. Near the lower center, small text reads “GOOD THRU”, above/near “MONTH/YEAR”, with expiry “00/00”. Bottom right white logo reads LUMINA PAY, with “LUMINA” large, “PAY” below, and a curved smile underline.

Constraints: Keep all text legible and aligned like a premium credit card. Use metallic embossing on the card number and cardholder name. Do not add extra numbers, logos, watermarks, or additional card fields.
